text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, hello there, Trainer. I'm sorry you had to
see that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Recently, my creative juices have been flowing
best after the sun exits its heavenly stage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My latest work is an opera written by and starring yours truly. Overlord of the Rose Sky will be told in twenty-six parts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Upon completion, this masterpiece will surely be
seen as a revolutionary contribution changing the
realm of fine arts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O seems fulfilled with her recent
productivity, but it's also apparent she could use
more rest.
